2604.12397.title: KoCo: Conditioning Language Model Pre-training on Knowledge Coordinates
2604.12397.paper_summary: Standard Large Language Model (LLM) pre-training typically treats corpora as flattened token sequences, often overlooking the real-world context that humans naturally rely on to contextualize information. To bridge this gap, we introduce Knowledge Coordinate Conditioning (KoCo), a simple method that maps every document into a three-dimensional semantic coordinate. By prepending these coordinates as textual prefixes for pre-training, we aim to equip the model with explicit contextual awareness to learn the documents within the real-world knowledge structure. Experiment results demonstrate that KoCo significantly enhances performance across 10 downstream tasks and accelerates pre-training convergence by approximately 30\%. Furthermore, our analysis indicates that explicitly modeling knowledge coordinates helps the model distinguish stable facts from noise, effectively mitigating hallucination in generated outputs.
2604.12397.paper_summary_zh: 標準的大型語言模型（LLM）預訓練通常將語料庫視為展平的標記序列，常常忽略人類自然依賴的現實世界上下文來為信息提供背景。為了彌補這一差距，我們引入了知識坐標條件（KoCo），這是一種簡單的方法，將每個文檔映射到三維語義坐標中。通過將這些坐標作為文本前綴附加於預訓練中，我們旨在使模型具備明確的上下文意識，以便在現實世界知識結構中學習文檔。實驗結果表明，KoCo顯著提高了10個下游任務的性能，並將預訓練的收斂速度加快了約30%。此外，我們的分析顯示，明確建模知識坐標有助於模型區分穩定事實與噪音，有效減輕生成輸出中的幻覺現象。
2604.12397.author: Yudong Li et.al.
2604.12397.authors: Yudong Li, Jiawei Cai, Linlin Shen
